task_completion.description: Navigate to the target product in Odoo
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo product form for 'Precision Ball Bearing - 6205-2RS' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure pricing for Allied Industrial Supply Co.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the product form under the 'Purchase' tab, there is a vendor line for 'Allied Industrial Supply Co.' showing a price of 12.50, minimum quantity of 100, and delivery lead time of 14 days.

task_completion.description: Configure pricing for Pacific Bearing Solutions
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the product form under the 'Purchase' tab, there is a vendor line for 'Pacific Bearing Solutions' showing a price of 11.80, minimum quantity of 250, and delivery lead time of 21 days.

task_completion.description: Create a Purchase Order for the most cost-effective supplier
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Request for Quotation (RFQ) or Purchase Order (PO) form in Odoo is open with the Vendor field set to 'Pacific Bearing Solutions'.

task_completion.description: Add the correct product, quantity, and price to the Purchase Order
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the PO form, the 'Products' tab contains a line item for 'Precision Ball Bearing - 6205-2RS' with a Quantity of 500 and a Unit Price of 11.80.
The status indicator in the top right of the Purchase Order form shows 'Purchase Order' or 'Locked' (highlighted), indicating the order has been confirmed, rather than 'RFQ'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Odoo web application in a browser, rather than using terminal scripts or API calls to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not directly edit the database
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using a PostgreSQL client or terminal commands to directly insert records into the Odoo database.
The confirmed Purchase Order is visible within the actual Odoo interface, not mocked in a text editor or HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Product: Precision Ball Bearing - 6205-2RS. Vendor 1: Allied Industrial Supply Co. (Price: $12.50, Min Qty: 100, Delay: 14 days).
